notes: MongoDB is a document database accessed via the Node driver's wire protocol, not a REST/JSON HTTP API. Synthesized a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the adaptor surface, modelling the three exposed operations (insertDocuments, findDocuments, updateDocument) as JSON REST endpoints keyed by database/collection so mocker can seed and serve document collections. Server URL is a placeholder; insert/update result shapes mirror the Node driver's InsertManyResult/UpdateResult.
